comment: Deterministic guardrails enforced by scripts/guard.js on every PreToolUse event. Actions: deny (block, tell Claude why), ask (escalate to the human). Patterns are JavaScript regular expressions. Edit this file, bump the plugin version, and ship.

bash_rules.reason: Agents run against dev only. Prod deploys go through CI. Rerun with --target dev or hand this to a human.
Destructive SQL is blocked for agents. Propose the statement for human review instead.
Recursive force deletes are blocked. Delete specific files by name.
Force pushes are blocked. Open a PR instead.
Piping downloads into a shell is blocked. Download, inspect, then run.

file_rules.reason: Migrations are immutable once committed. Create a new numbered migration file instead.
Production config change. A human needs to approve this edit.
Environment files are off limits to agents.

content_rules.reason: That looks like an AWS access key. Secrets go in environment variables or a secrets manager, never in code.
Private key material is blocked from being written to the repository.
That looks like a hardcoded credential. Use an environment variable.
